ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or response filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)
